description_long: This lounge object consists of two facing booth-style seating areas, each enclosed by high, straight-backed panels in a deep green color. The seating surfaces and backrests are upholstered in a contrasting muted magenta, with visible slatted bases supporting the seat cushions. The booths are separated by a central table in each section, with black metal legs supporting both the seats and tables. The exterior panels feature a geometric black triangle pattern on one side, adding a modern visual accent. The overall design is modular and private, suitable for collaborative or semi-private seating in urban parks, plazas, or public indoor spaces.
description: A modern, dual booth lounge with high green privacy panels, magenta cushions, and geometric black accents, featuring central tables and black metal legs.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the solid green privacy panels and a glimpse of the magenta seat inside.
description_view_1: Side view revealing both booth interiors, magenta cushions, slatted seat bases, and central tables.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, similar to view 0, with solid green panels and visible magenta seating.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the geometric black triangle pattern on the green exterior panels and the booth structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each booth has a single long seat cushion and a single long back cushion, both attached and spanning the width of the booth; cushions are rectangular and flush with the booth structure.
attribute_backrest_design: Tall, straight, rectangular backrests integrated with the booth panels, extending to the full height of the enclosure, with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are absent; the high side panels serve as boundaries instead.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are thin, black metal, straight, and tubular, with a low profile and minimal decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid magenta on the cushions, while the exterior panels are solid green with a geometric black triangle pattern on one side.
